compiled_state.title: Update project docs to reflect brainstorm UX probe loop and preplanning gate
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Update existing project documentation to reflect the brainstorm Phase 1 changes (Surface dimension, Phase 1 Step 2.5 UX probe set, loop-back state machine, top-level anti-redundancy directive, `ui_probes:deferred` tag, non-interactive deferral) and the new preplanning UI Probes Deferred Gate (S8). Do not create new documentation files.

**Why**: Ensure future agents have accurate awareness of brainstorm Phase 1 structure, the new `brainstorm.ui_keywords` config key, and the `ui_probes:deferred` tag semantics including how preplanning (S8) reacts to it.

**Scope**:
- IN:
  - Update `CLAUDE.md` architecture section so the brainstorm description reflects the new Phase 1 Step 2 Surface dimension, Phase 1 Step 2.5 UX probe set, Phase 1 Gate loop-back, top-level anti-redundancy directive, and the `ui_probes:deferred` tag lifecycle (emitted by brainstorm in non-interactive mode, consumed by preplanning gate).
  - Update `plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md` to document the new `brainstorm.ui_keywords` config key (merge semantics, default value location, example override).
  - Update `plugins/dso/skills/shared/workflows/epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md` if it references Phase 1 Step 2 structure and would become stale.
  - Follow `.claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md` for formatting, structure, and conventions.
- OUT:
  - Creating new documentation files.
  - Changing the SKILL.md files themselves (handled by S1–S5 and S8).
  - Sprint or roadmap consumer-handling documentation beyond noting that `ui_probes:deferred` is currently enforced only at preplanning entry.

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, `CLAUDE.md` architecture section reflects the new brainstorm Phase 1 structure — Step 2 Surface dimension, Step 2.5 UX probe set with per-epic flag, Phase 1 Gate loop-back state machine, top-level anti-redundancy directive — and the `ui_probes:deferred` tag lifecycle (emitted by brainstorm non-interactive, consumed by preplanning gate S8).
  ← Provides traceability documentation for SC1 through SC7.
- When this story is complete, `plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md` documents the `brainstorm.ui_keywords` config key (default value location, replace-vs-merge semantics as decided in S2, example override).
- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md documents that the `ui_probes:deferred` tag is consumed by the preplanning UI Probes Deferred Gate (from S8) and has no other enforcement consumers in this epic; any future sprint/roadmap handling would be a follow-on.

## Considerations

- [Maintainability] Follow `.claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md` conventions for CLAUDE.md updates — keep the architecture section concise and reference SKILL.md files for full detail rather than duplicating content.
- [Consumer impact] Documenting the tag's enforcement boundary (preplanning only) sets correct expectations for future work — sprint and roadmap currently treat the tag as informational.

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.

comments.body: Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for documentation formatting, structure, and conventions.
comments.author: Claude
